summary: Comprehensive testing of new Cactus game features. All 36 backend tests passed. Fixed bug where bot's final turn didn't trigger game end. All new features verified working: username-based login, num_rounds config, round display, special card auto-activation, skip_special action, and stats page.

bugs_fixed.issue: Bot's final turn after cactus call did not trigger game end (phase stuck at 'playing')
bugs_fixed.root_cause: execute_bot_turn() called advance_turn() which set round_ended=True, but didn't call end_round_and_update_stats()
bugs_fixed.fix: Added check for round_ended after advance_turn() in execute_bot_turn() to call end_round_and_update_stats()

bugs_fixed.issue: Test fixtures used email-based login but backend now requires username
bugs_fixed.fix: Updated auth_token and test_user_info fixtures to use username='testuser123'

bugs_fixed.issue: Same email-based login issue in fixtures
bugs_fixed.fix: Updated fixtures to use username-based login

critical_code_review_comments: Username-based login properly implemented with case-insensitive regex matching
num_rounds config correctly stored in room.config and used by end_round_and_update_stats
Special card auto-activation (awaiting_special_action flag) works for discard_drawn and exchange actions
skip_special action properly clears special state and advances turn
Stats are correctly updated when game_over is true in end_round_and_update_stats

success_rate.backend: 100% (36/36 passed, 4 skipped due to random cards)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested: (1) Login now uses 'username' field instead of 'email', (2) num_rounds parameter available in create room dialog and stored in config, (3) Round display shows 'Manche: X/Y' in GameBoard top-right, (4) Special cards (8, 10, J) auto-activate by setting awaiting_special_action=true, (5) skip_special action clears special state and advances turn, (6) Stats page shows games_played, wins, total_score, perfect_cactus_count with charts and achievements.

features_tested.login_with_username: PASSED - Frontend uses 'Pseudo' label, backend accepts 'username' field
features_tested.num_rounds_config: PASSED - Slider in create dialog, stored in room.config.num_rounds
features_tested.round_display: PASSED - game_state.round shows current round, room.config.num_rounds for total
features_tested.special_card_auto_activation: PASSED - awaiting_special_action set when 8/10/J discarded or exchanged
features_tested.skip_special_action: PASSED - Clears special state and advances turn
features_tested.stats_page: PASSED - Shows all stats with bar/pie charts and achievements
features_tested.game_end_after_cactus: PASSED (FIXED) - Game properly ends after bot's final turn

rca_of_issue.bug: Game didn't end after bot's final turn following cactus call
rca_of_issue.root_cause: execute_bot_turn() called advance_turn() which sets round_ended=True when remaining_final_turns reaches 0, but didn't check for round_ended and call end_round_and_update_stats() like the game_action endpoint does
rca_of_issue.impact: Game phase remained 'playing' instead of transitioning to 'ended', stats never updated
rca_of_issue.fix_applied: Added the same round_end check logic to execute_bot_turn() after advance_turn() call
rca_of_issue.verification: Tests now pass - game ends properly with phase='ended' and game_over=true after bot's final turn
